stemHtml: Which method is used by the pilot to insert RNAV waypoints into an aircraft’s FMS?

options.a: Manually by selecting the CRS/DISTANCE on an HSI.
options.b: Manually by inserting one waypoint at a time, during the flight.
options.c: Automatically sent from the pilot’s electronic flight bag (EFB) to the FMS.
options.d: Automatically loaded into the FMS using a company route registration/airport pairing from the navigation database.
